scripts.dbml:validate: python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('backend/db/kali_notes.db'); tables=[r[0] for r in conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\").fetchall()]; print(f'Connected: {len(tables)} tables found')"
scripts.dbml:watch: echo 'Run: python3 scripts/sqlite2dbml.py backend/db/kali_notes.db -o db.dbml' && fswatch -o backend/db/kali_notes.db | xargs -n1 -I{} python3 scripts/sqlite2dbml.py backend/db/kali_notes.db -o db.dbml
